usage.en: One-sentence description of what this media is used for.
usage.zh: 一句话描述此培养基的用途。

prepSteps.en: Thaw FBS and supplements at 37°C water bath.
prepSteps.zh: 37°C 水浴解冻 FBS 和添加物。

prepSteps.en: Add supplements to base medium under sterile conditions.
prepSteps.zh: 在无菌条件下将添加物加入基础培养基。

prepSteps.en: Mix gently by inversion. Do not vortex.
Label with date, supplements, and initials. Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: 标注日期、添加物和缩写。4°C 保存。

notes.en: Tips, shelf life considerations, or cell line-specific notes.
notes.zh: 提示、保质期注意事项或细胞系特异性说明。
